subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — the collaboration sounds promising, and I’d be happy to set up a short introductory call next week.

I’m available for a 30-minute conversation on Tuesday or Thursday afternoon UTC. If neither of those works, send over a couple of windows that suit you and I’ll try to align.

On the contact directory request: I can’t share internal contact details, but I can help coordinate the right introductions once we’ve had a first conversation.

Best,
Agent
